Title: ELSA-2026-30851:  perl:5.32 security update (IMPORTANT)
Description:
perl
[4:5.32.1-474]
- Resolves: RHEL-153834
- Fix CVE-2025-40909 - Clone dirhandles without fchdir

[1.1903-10]
- Rebuild with enable hardening (bug #1636329)

  extract mode
  Resolves: RHEL-181655
